title: Planning artifacts and POC foundation
objective: Define the target-state architecture reference, establish a pragmatic planning-artifact schema, and scaffold the single-app POC foundation for GitLab reporting.
deliverables: Base application scaffold and UI system
acceptance_criteria: The repo contains a target-state technical design document
The repo contains pragmatic epic and issue artifacts for the POC
The application scaffold supports immediate feature implementation
verification: The scaffold passes lint and typecheck
notes: The POC intentionally collapses the target-state architecture into a single Next.js app for speed.
GitLab secrets stay server-side even though enterprise security hardening is deferred.
